examples: Opt for grilled foods instead of fried, avoid or scrape away high-fat condiments like mayonnaise, and share those French fries to keep portion size down.
Use low-fat or nonfat versions of these condiments.
Spruce up your homemade lunch with some tasty extras, like condiments.
The Brakas envisioned a pub with good food, homemade condiments and simple decor.
Feel free to buy whatever type of bread, meat and condiments you prefer.
